answer: Metadata extraction success rate was impacted because the concept frontmatter parser skipped non-index markdown; the canary shows yaml_frontmatter was ignored in favor of body_text_only in md_frontmatter_ingest_v1. Remediation is to enable YAML frontmatter parsing on non-index Markdown files, validated by concept-fm-canary-pass.

facts.remediation: enable parsing of YAML frontmatter on non-index Markdown files
facts.root_cause: concept frontmatter parser skipped non-index markdown
